featureDetection.rationale: Uses CSSStyleSheet insertion parsing natively to probe for experimental @container anchored support, updating support messages.

gracefulFallback.rationale: Sandbox handles dragging with smooth fallback mechanics, rendering static galleries cleanly on legacy engines.

genuineInteraction.rationale: Draggable hover target enables real-time movement in sandbox, recalculating speech bubble arrow directions and colors dynamically.

builderMultipleDemos.rationale: Fabulous design utilizing container queries to adjust decorative element details (arrows/tails).

designSystemContrast.rationale: Follows style guides perfectly, ensuring highly responsive layout grids.
